title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Mokama
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Mokama constituency.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Mokama
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Mokama assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
